normal: I'm so sorry, {target}. I had some unexpected car repairs this month that wiped out my budget. I'll get you back next paycheck.
Hey {target}, my company's payroll system glitched and my salary is delayed by a week. Can I have a slight extension?
I completely forgot, {target}. I just had to pay an emergency medical bill for my family. I'll make sure to settle it by the end of the month.
Sorry {target}, my utility bills were way higher than expected this month. I'll send you half of it next week, promise.
ridiculous: I'm sorry {target}, the cash I saved for you was eaten by termites under my mattress. I'm currently trying to piece the bills back together.
Listen {target}, I loaned the money to a Nigerian prince who emailed me. He's supposed to wire me back 10x the amount next week. Just hold on!
I had the cash ready, {target}, but on my way to the ATM, I was mugged by a gang of aggressive raccoons. They took my whole wallet.
I deeply apologize {target}, I just got scammed by a fake iguana breeding investment scheme. My capital is tied up in reptiles right now.
realityBending: Listen {target}, technically money is energy. According to the Laws of Thermodynamics, energy cannot be created or destroyed. So your money isn't gone, it has just changed into a cosmic aura surrounding me.
Sorry {target}, I was abducted by aliens and they confiscated all my earthly assets for research in the Andromeda galaxy. As soon as I contact the intergalactic embassy, I'll wire you.
I'm trapped in a time loop, {target}. Today keeps repeating and I haven't reached the day where I actually have money to pay you. Please be patient with this spacetime anomaly.
{target}, the Central Bank just reset the entire national financial system in my dream last night. De facto, all civilian debts have been erased.
